schema_note: Reference data: 3 English gates (CDU entry / AHPRA ELS registration / EOI points) and 4 ELS exemption pathways. The binding constraint = the HIGHEST of the 3 gates. ELS exemption default = NOT SATISFIED for applicants without 6+ years of education in a recognised country. This file is reference data only — for per-applicant application, see examples/sample-output.md.

gate_2_ahpra_els_registration.note: English test pathway is the default. ELS exemption via education is possible but restrictive (see below).

three_english_gates.binding_constraint_rule: HIGHEST of the 3 gates. AHPRA ELS (65 each) is binding for registration. EOI superior (79 each) is binding if aiming for +20 EOI points.

els_exemption_pathways.purpose: If applicant qualifies for an ELS exemption pathway, they don't need to sit the English test for AHPRA registration. ALL pathways require education in a RECOGNISED country.
els_exemption_pathways.important_note: CHINA is NOT on the recognised list. Undergrad in China does NOT count toward ELS exemption, regardless of language.

pathway_a_primary_language.description: English is your primary language AND you completed ALL education in Australia
pathway_a_primary_language.requirement: Grew up and completed all primary + secondary + tertiary education in Australia

pathway_b_combined_education.description: 2+ years of secondary education in English in recognised country + your professional qualification in English in recognised country
pathway_b_combined_education.requirement: At least 2 years secondary education in English (recognised country) + the OT qualification taught and assessed in English (recognised country)

pathway_c_advanced_education.description: 6+ years of FTE education, all in English in recognised country, including your OT qualification + advanced tertiary (AQF 7+)
pathway_c_advanced_education.requirement: At least 6 years FTE in recognised country. The OT qualification must be one of those 6 years. Maximum 2-year break allowed.

pathway_d_school_education.description: Primary + secondary school in English in recognised country + professional qualification taught and assessed in English (any country)
pathway_d_school_education.requirement: All primary + secondary school in recognised country, regardless of where the OT degree was taught

els_exemption_pathways.verdict: Most international applicants fail all 4 ELS exemption pathways. ELS education exemption does NOT apply unless 6+ years in recognised country. Most applicants MUST achieve gate 2 (PTE 65 each) via the English test pathway to register with AHPRA.

applicant_profile_placeholder._comment: Replace with your profile; evaluate which gate binds.
self_check_questions: Is your current PTE 65 each? If yes → ELS gate met. If no → retake.
Did you spend 6+ years in recognised country (AU/NZ/UK/IE/US/CA/ZA)? If no → all ELS exemptions fail.
Do you want EOI points? PTE 65 each = +10; PTE 79 each = +20.

placeholders_tbd_applicant_to_fill: Confirm exact PTE score mapping (AHPRA may accept PTE Academic or PTE General; verify)
Confirm whether 2-year CDU Master alone counts as 'advanced education' under pathway c (it doesn't, but verify for alternate profiles)
Confirm current 2025-26 EOI thresholds for OT 189 (current: 75-80; in case 4-year projection shifts)
